global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body, predominantly yellow with olive green and brown streaks. It features a pointed beak, bright yellow underparts, and a distinctive black streaked pattern on the sides. The wings and tail are brown with subtle yellow edges.

part_details.beak: Short, pointed, and slightly curved, grayish in color.
part_details.underparts: Vivid yellow, smooth texture, extending from throat to belly.
part_details.back: Olive green with a smooth, matte texture.
part_details.wings: Brown with subtle yellow edges, streamlined shape.
part_details.tail: Brown, slightly forked with yellow tinges.

spatial_relations: The pointed beak is positioned at the front of the head.
The bright yellow underparts extend from the throat to the belly.
The olive green back covers the upper body.
The brown wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
